action.reasoning: Observation: Direction is one-hot encoded by SB3 to shape (B, 4), but Linear(1, 16) expects (B, 1). Analysis: SB3 MultiInputPolicy one-hot encodes Discrete spaces. Decision: Fix Linear to accept 4 inputs. Train 5M steps and submit eval.
